provenance.trigger_reason: M20: derive and implement the next VISION-aligned tusq.dev increment: an opt-in local execution-policy scaffold for the MCP serve path. The goal is to move beyond describe-only toward safe execution wrappers without live product side effects: validate tools/call arguments against approved compiled tool schemas, require explicit opt-in policy, and return auditable dry-run execution plans/metadata. Keep all work repo-local/offline and governed.
